title: tanacetum fastigiatum
intro: Tanacetum fastigiatum, also known as Tansy Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Tanacetum fastigiatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. Tanacetum fastigiatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for various herbal remedies, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
